'''tasava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dobhash|dobhash]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-s-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dobhash|dobhash]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tasava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæsævæth|tæsævæth]] || [[word:tæsævæj|tæsævæj]] || [[word:tæsævæsh|tæsævæsh]] || [[word:tæsævæ|tæsævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tasasavath|tasasavath]] || [[word:tasasavaj|tasasavaj]] || [[word:tasasavash|tasasavash]] || [[word:tasasava|tasasava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tasavath|tasavath]] || [[word:tasavaj|tasavaj]] || [[word:tasavash|tasavash]] || [[word:tasava|tasava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tasafvath|tasafvath]] || [[word:tasafvaj|tasafvaj]] || [[word:tasafvash|tasafvash]] || [[word:tasafvaf|tasafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tasavatha|tasavatha]] || [[word:tasavaja|tasavaja]] || [[word:tasavasha|tasavasha]] || [[word:tasavaka|tasavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tasavath|tasavath]] || [[word:tasavaj|tasavaj]] || [[word:tasavash|tasavash]] || [[word:tasava|tasava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tasavathal|tasavathal]] || [[word:tasavajal|tasavajal]] || [[word:tasavashal|tasavashal]] || [[word:tasavakal|tasavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tasavathatha|tasavathatha]] || [[word:tasavajaja|tasavajaja]] || [[word:tasavashasha|tasavashasha]] || [[word:tasavaka|tasavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tasavathan|tasavathan]] || [[word:tasavajan|tasavajan]] || [[word:tasavashan|tasavashan]] || [[word:tasavakan|tasavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tasavathaoro|tasavathaoro]] || [[word:tasavajaoro|tasavajaoro]] || [[word:tasavashaoro|tasavashaoro]] || [[word:tasavakaoro|tasavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
